op.text: [as of 2025-04-14] Sprained ankle badly on 2025-04-12 during mile nine of trail run in Forest Park (wet root); grade-two sprain or worse, in walking boot, seeing orthopedist 2025-04-18; doctor said eight to ten weeks before running possible; withdrew marathon registration 2025-04-14 — Lakefront Marathon October 2025 is off

On 2025-04-14, regarding withdrawing from marathon after ankle injury, said: 'That training arc was the first future-shaped thing I'd built since mom.' and 'I withdrew my registration this morning so I couldn't waffle about it. It's off. I'm not doing the thing where I pretend it might still happen.' (2025-04-14)
